summary: Iteration 19 - Pipeline New Features Testing. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). All new endpoints working: /upload for images, /regenerate-design with feedback, pipeline creation with contact_info and uploaded_assets. Frontend: Pipeline view working with StepCards, ImageLightbox with Baixar/Pedir Ajuste buttons verified.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor Recharts sizing issue

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all features verified visually, active pipeline blocked creation form test)

seed_data_creation: Used existing pipeline ID 09fc2709-0bba-4bf9-96dd-7bdad383ff35 for testing. Test files prefixed with TEST_iter19_
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Pipeline features verified: (1) Upload endpoint accepts images with logo/reference types, (2) Regenerate-design endpoint works with design_index and feedback, starts background thread, (3) Pipeline creation accepts contact_info and uploaded_assets in request body, stores in result field, (4) ImageLightbox working with full-size view, thumbnails, Baixar and Pedir Ajuste buttons, (5) StepCards show all 5 agents with status badges and elapsed times.

POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/upload.notes: Uploads images to /app/backend/uploads/pipeline/assets/, returns {url, filename, type, size}. Validates image content-type.

POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/{id}/regene.notes: Accepts design_index (0-2) and feedback string. Returns {status: 'regenerating', design_index}. Runs in background thread.

POST /api/campaigns/pipeline.notes: Accepts contact_info {phone, website, email} and uploaded_assets [{url, type, filename}]. Stores in result field.

GET /api/campaigns/pipeline/list.notes: Returns pipelines with all fields for HistoryCard (id, briefing, status, platforms, steps, created_at)

GET /api/campaigns/pipeline/{id}.notes: Returns steps with data for CompletedSummary tabs (approved_content, image_urls, pedro_publish output)

step_cards.notes: All 5 step cards found with status badges and elapsed times

image_lightbox.notes: Full-size image display with z-50 fixed positioning. Baixar links to image download. Pedir Ajuste opens feedback form that calls regenerate-design endpoint.

lucas_design_images.notes: 3 generated images displayed with 'Design 1', 'Design 2', 'Design 3' labels. Click opens lightbox.

asset_uploader.notes: Code verified with data-testid attributes. Logo and reference upload zones with clear buttons in code.

contact_info_section.notes: Collapsible section with phone/website/email inputs. Data-testid attributes present in code.

completed_summary_tabs.notes: 4 tabs: Preview Completo (copy+images+schedule), Copy Final, Images, Cronograma. Only shows for completed pipelines.

mocked_apis.notes: Channel integrations are MOCKED. Pipeline AI agents use real Emergent LLM integration.
